title: labisia steenisiana
intro: Labisia steenisiana, also known as "Kacip Fatimah" or "Malaysian ginseng," is a type of herbaceous plant native to Malaysia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Primulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Labisia steenisiana include its potential to reduce menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Labisia steenisiana is often prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, and tea infusions, and is also used in traditional Malay medicine, where it is valued for its versatility and efficacy.
